key_links.note: but broker usage in status/session commands is buggy

gaps.description: JobManager constructor expects db_path (str|Path|None), but status and session commands pass JsonBroker object
gaps.location: src/tflow/__main__.py:102-103 (status command) and lines 122-123 (session list), 138-139 (session show)
gaps.evidence: TypeError: expected str, bytes or os.PathLike object, not JsonBroker
gaps.fix_needed: Pass db_path to JobManager(), not JsonBroker. JsonBroker and JobManager are separate implementations - status/session commands should use one or the other, not both.
